$comment: Generated by tools/generate-schema.js from the running palworld-server-docker image. Min/max are editable guardrails used by the manager UI and API validation.

settings.description: Overall difficulty preset. "None" means custom values below apply.
Pal spawn randomizer mode.
Seed for the Pal randomizer.
Randomize levels of randomized Pals.
Day length multiplier (higher = faster days).
Night length multiplier (higher = faster nights).
EXP gain multiplier.
Pal capture chance multiplier.
Pal spawn count multiplier (high values cost server FPS).
Damage dealt by Pals multiplier.
Damage taken by Pals multiplier.
Damage dealt by players multiplier.
Damage taken by players multiplier.
Player hunger drain multiplier.
Player stamina drain multiplier.
Player HP regen multiplier.
Player HP regen while sleeping multiplier.
Pal hunger drain multiplier.
Pal stamina drain multiplier.
Pal HP regen multiplier.
Pal HP regen in Palbox multiplier.
Structure HP multiplier.
Damage to structures multiplier.
Structure deterioration rate (0 disables decay).
Gathering yield multiplier.
Gatherable object HP multiplier.
Gatherable respawn interval multiplier (higher = slower).
Enemy loot drop multiplier.
What is dropped on death: nothing / items / items+equipment / everything incl. Pals.
Players can damage each other.
Friendly fire within guilds.
Enable base raids by invaders.
Enable UNKO (poop mechanics easter egg).
Aim assist for controllers.
Aim assist for keyboard/mouse.
Max dropped items in the world (high values cost performance).
Max UNKO items in the world.
Max base camps server-wide.
Max worker Pals per base camp.
Hours before dropped items despawn.
Auto-disband guilds with no online players.
Hours of guild inactivity before auto-reset.
Max players per guild.
Max base camps per guild.
Hours for the largest eggs to hatch (0 = instant).
Pal work speed multiplier.
World autosave interval in seconds.
Multiplayer world mode flag.
Enable PvP mode.
Hardcore mode (permadeath).
Allow character re-creation after hardcore death.
Pals are permanently lost on death.
Other guilds can loot your death drops.
Penalty for players who have not logged in recently.
Enable fast travel.
New players choose start location on the map.
Player bodies remain in the world after logout.
Defense against other guild players.
Hide other guilds' base camp area effects.
Restrict building near certain areas.
Item weight multiplier (lower = carry more).
Max players in a coop (invite-code) session.
Max players on the server (ServerPlayerMaxNum).
Server name shown in browser.
Server description shown in browser.
Admin password (also used for RCON / REST API auth).
Password required to join the server.
Public port advertised to the community browser.
Public IP advertised to the community browser (auto-detected if empty).
Enable RCON (REST API is preferred).
RCON port.
Server region string.
Use authentication for connections.
URL of the ban list.
Enable REST API (required by this manager for announce/validate).
settings.critical: The manager uses the REST API — disabling it breaks announcements, graceful reboots and validation.

settings.description: REST API port. DO NOT forward this port to the internet.
Show player list in the server browser.
Max chat messages per player per minute.
Allowed platforms — parentheses required, e.g. (Steam,Xbox,PS5,Mac).
settings.patternHint: must be wrapped in parentheses, e.g. (Steam,Xbox,PS5,Mac)

settings.description: Enable Palworld's own rolling save backups.
Minutes between supply drops.
Enable predator boss Pals.
Max structures per player (0 = unlimited).
Distance (units) at which pawns replicate to clients.
Allow exporting Pals to the Global Palbox.
Allow importing Pals from the Global Palbox.
Equipment durability loss multiplier (0 = no durability loss).
Container sync interval (seconds).
Food spoilage speed multiplier.
Max physics-active dropped items (-1 = engine default).
Allow client-side mods.
Pal storage update check interval (seconds).
Server log format.
Broadcast join/leave messages in chat.
Ranch Pal action speed multiplier.
Comma-separated technology IDs to block.
Cooldown before rejoining a guild (minutes).
How often to check for inactive guild masters (seconds).
Days of guild-master inactivity before mastership transfers.
Guilds processed per server tick.
Respawn block time (seconds).
Threshold before respawn penalty applies (seconds).
Respawn penalty time scaling.
Show PvP item counts for base camps on the map.
Show PvP item counts for players on the map.
Extra drop type on PvP kill.
Extra drop count on PvP kill.
Enable extra drops on PvP kill.
Enable proximity voice chat.
Distance of full voice volume (units).
Distance at which voice fades to zero (units).
Allow enhancing Health stat.
Allow enhancing Attack stat.
Allow enhancing Stamina stat.
Allow enhancing Weight stat.
Allow enhancing Work Speed stat.
Show builder UID on structures.
Builder-name display cache TTL (seconds).
List the server in the community server browser (-publiclobby). Use together with SERVER_PASSWORD, and make sure your game port is forwarded.
Steam query port (-queryport launch flag). Must match the port mapping in the compose file — use a distinct one per server on a host.
Pause the server process when no players are online (world time stops; wakes on connection).
Seconds after the last player leaves before the server pauses.
Log auto-pause activity.
Verbose auto-pause debug logging.
Scheduled in-container reboots via cron.
Cron schedule for automatic reboots (container timezone TZ).
settings.patternHint: must be a 5-field cron expression, e.g. 0 4 * * *

settings.description: Minutes of in-game warning before a scheduled reboot.
Reboot on schedule even when players are online.
Automatically update the game server on a cron schedule.
Cron schedule for update checks.
settings.patternHint: must be a 5-field cron expression, e.g. 0 4 * * *

settings.description: Minutes of warning before an update restart (ignored when empty server).
Update/validate the server files on container start.
Pin the server to a specific Steam depot manifest (version lock).
Steam account (needed for version locking and Workshop mod downloads).
Steam password for STEAM_USERNAME.
Automatic scheduled backups of the save data.
Cron schedule for automatic backups.
settings.patternHint: must be a 5-field cron expression, e.g. 0 4 * * *

settings.description: Automatically delete backups older than OLD_BACKUP_DAYS.
Days to keep backups when DELETE_OLD_BACKUPS is on.
Log player joins/leaves (required by auto-pause).
Seconds between player-list polls.
Filter duplicate/noisy log lines.
Minimum container log level.
Container timezone (affects cron schedules and timestamps).
Discord webhook URL for event notifications.
Send Discord messages silently (@silent).
Webhook connect timeout (seconds).
Webhook total timeout (seconds).
Enable the pre update boot Discord message.
Message for the pre update boot event.
Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).
Enable the post update boot Discord message.
Message for the post update boot event.
Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).

Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).

Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).
Enable the post shutdown Discord message.
Message for the post shutdown event.
Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).
Enable the player join Discord message.
Message for the player join event.
Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).
Enable the player leave Discord message.
Message for the player leave event.
Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).
Enable the pre backup Discord message.
Message for the pre backup event.
Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).
Enable the post backup Discord message.
Message for the post backup event.

Enable the pre backup delete Discord message.

settings.default: Removing backups older than old_backup_days days
settings.description: Message for the pre backup delete event.
Override webhook URL for this event (falls back to DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL).
Enable the post backup delete Discord message.

settings.default: Removed backups older than old_backup_days days
settings.description: Message for the post backup delete event.
